critic_notes: Four Smartphones/Tablets questions. Q001/Q003/Q004 pass cleanly. Q002 (A8 Installation von Apps) flags for non-contiguous splicing: the quote joins two MUSS sentences while omitting an intermediate SOLLTEN sentence. Each concatenated sentence is verbatim in the source; claims are correct.

issues.detail: Fragment `Die Institution MUSS regeln, ob, wie und welche Apps Benutze...` — non-contiguous sentences (each traces to source but intermediate text was omitted without ` • ` separator).
